Troubleshot Test Sites

Each page below is intentionally broken in a specific way for testing diagnostic tools.

Slow Page

Blocking JS, slow API calls, layout shifts, 404 resources — tests performance diagnostics.

Broken Layout

Missing viewport, z-index hell, overflow, images without dimensions — tests DOM/CSS diagnostics.

API Failures

404s, 500s, CORS, timeouts, DNS failures — tests network diagnostics.

Console Errors

TypeError, ReferenceError, RangeError, unhandled promise rejections — tests console diagnostics.

Security Issues

Mixed content, CSP violations, insecure forms — tests security diagnostics.

Accessibility Nightmare

Missing lang/title, no landmarks, bad contrast, unlabeled forms — tests accessibility diagnostics.
